integrationStatus.profiling_tools: Partial - VS Code profiling guide downloaded

instructions.addingDocuments: Place resources in appropriate subdirectories. Update this index.json with document metadata including title, author, description, license, topics, and relevance.
instructions.downloadingSources: Download from VS Code documentation, Node.js profiling guides, and reputable performance resources. Prioritize official documentation.
instructions.namingConvention: Use clear, descriptive filenames with underscores: tool_name.html, technique_name.md
instructions.licenseCompliance: Include license information for all resources. Prioritize official documentation.
instructions.performanceFocus: Resources should enable SWEObeyMe to: (1) understand profiling tools, (2) implement performance optimization, (3) manage memory properly, (4) optimize CPU usage, (5) follow performance best practices.
